title: ranunculus sardous var. trilobus
intro: Ranunculus sardous var. trilobus, also known as the meadow clematis or meadow crowfoot, is a perennial plant in the buttercup family native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus sardous var. trilobus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a useful treatment for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of conditions, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity.
